title: dryopteris glabra var. nuda
intro: Dryopteris glabra var. nuda, also known as the naked or smooth wood fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris glabra species, a type of fern native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are thought to be due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dryopteris glabra var. nuda include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine.
